items.title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
items.summary: OpenAI announced the release of GPT-5.4 mini and nano, new smaller, more efficient models designed for intelligence at scale.

items.title: Jensen Huang just put Nvidia’s Blackwell and Vera Rubin sales projections into the $1 trillion stratosphere
items.summary: Nvidia's CEO Jensen Huang projected massive sales for its new Blackwell and Vera Rubin AI chips, indicating a trillion-dollar market opportunity.

items.title: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files — no coding required
items.summary: Anthropic introduced Cowork, a new Claude Desktop agent designed to interact with user files and assist with tasks without requiring coding.

items.title: Mistral bets on ‘build-your-own AI’ as it takes on OpenAI, Anthropic in the enterprise
items.summary: Mistral AI is focusing on providing tools for enterprises to build custom AI solutions, positioning itself as a key competitor to OpenAI and Anthropic.

items.title: AI Can Learn Scientific Taste
items.summary: Research demonstrates that AI models can be trained to recognize and apply 'scientific taste,' potentially accelerating scientific discovery.

items.title: Show HN: Sourcetable – AI Spreadsheet and Data Platform
items.summary: Sourcetable launched an AI-powered spreadsheet and data platform designed to simplify data analysis and management through intelligent automation.

items.title: Launch HN: Innate (YC F24) – Home robots as easy to program as AI agents
items.summary: Innate introduced home robots that can be programmed as easily as AI agents, aiming to make robotics more accessible for everyday use.

items.title: OpenSeeker: Democratizing Frontier Search Agents by Fully Open-Sourcing Training Data
items.summary: OpenSeeker aims to democratize advanced search agents by open-sourcing their training data, fostering transparency and collaborative development.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.summary: Google announced Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, a new model optimized for efficient, scalable intelligence across various applications.

items.title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection
items.summary: OpenAI detailed new methods and research for designing AI agents that are more resilient to prompt injection attacks, enhancing security.

items.title: symphony: OpenAI's orchestrator of autonomous dev agents
items.summary: OpenAI released 'symphony,' an open-source orchestrator designed to manage and coordinate autonomous development agents.

items.title: Railway secures $100 million to challenge AWS with AI-native cloud infrastructure
items.summary: Railway raised $100 million to develop AI-native cloud infrastructure, aiming to compete with major cloud providers like AWS.

items.title: Nous Research's NousCoder-14B is an open-source coding model landing right in the Claude Code moment
items.summary: Nous Research released NousCoder-14B, an open-source coding model that offers a free alternative to commercial coding assistants like Claude Code.

items.title: ILION: Deterministic Pre-Execution Safety Gates for Agentic AI Systems
items.summary: Researchers introduced ILION, a framework for deterministic pre-execution safety gates to enhance the reliability and safety of agentic AI systems.

items.title: Widespread Gender and Pronoun Bias in Moral Judgments Across LLMs
items.summary: A study revealed widespread gender and pronoun biases in the moral judgments made by various large language models, highlighting ethical concerns.
